evals.prompt: I need to start working on story 2-3-implement-jwt-auth which affects om-blk-auth-service and om-newblink-blink-bff-service. Set up the branches for me.
evals.expected_output: Derive branch feat/2-3-implement-jwt-auth, lookup default branches from .gitmodules, create same branch in both services, push with -u

assertions.text: Same branch name in both services

evals.prompt: I just finished implementing changes for story 1-1-user-registration in om-blk-auth-service and om-newblink-iam-service. Help me commit and push everything properly.
evals.expected_output: Commit separately per service with conventional format and story key, add specific files, push services before parent

assertions.text: Uses conventional commit format with story key
Adds specific files not git add .
Knows om-newblink-iam-service uses dev not develop

evals.prompt: The PRs for story 3-2-add-kafka-events have been merged in om-blk-scheduler-service and om-newblink-pushevent-service. Update the parent repo.
evals.expected_output: Checkout default branch and pull in each service, stage both submodule paths, commit parent with story reference

assertions.text: Checks out default branch in each service
Returns to parent root before staging
Commit message references story and lists services

evals.prompt: I just pulled the latest from main and now my submodules are out of sync. Some services show detached HEAD. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Check for uncommitted work, sync URLs, update submodules, explain detached HEAD, show re-attach option

assertions.text: Shows how to re-attach to tracked branches

evals.prompt: Give me a quick overview of what's going on across all my services - which ones have changes and what branches they're on
evals.expected_output: Efficient foreach command filtering to interesting services, compare against default branches from .gitmodules

assertions.text: Uses efficient foreach not manual per-service
Filters to only show interesting services

evals.prompt: Create a feature branch feat/OMPBLINK-50000-fix-search off develop in om-newblink-bl-service
evals.expected_output: Detect develop is wrong for this service (uses dev), warn user, correct to dev, verify via .gitmodules

assertions.text: Detects develop is wrong for this service

evals.prompt: Push my changes on develop in om-blk-alert-service to origin
evals.expected_output: Warn about auto-deploy to dev environment, require user confirmation, review commits, no force-push

assertions.text: Warns about auto-deploy to dev environment
